about.title: About Me
home.description: A personal academic website showcasing research, publications, and more.
home.hero_tagline: Studying the cosmos through stellar spectroscopy and data-driven methods
home.hero_description: I am a postdoctoral researcher specializing in stellar astrophysics. My work focuses on mining large spectroscopic surveys to understand stellar populations, chemical evolution, and the structure of the Milky Way.
home.quick_about: Learn about my background, education, and research interests.
